label: indigena-mexicano
description: un indigena mexicano en época de la conquista de américa con atuendos de la época

label: Un soldado español del siglo XV
description: Un soldado español del siglo XV con ropa y atuendos de la epoca de la conquista de america

label: mapa america (expresive)
description: A continuous and expressive thinking line depicting the complete silhouette of the Americas from the Arctic north to the tip of Patagonia, featuring the textured ridges of the Andes and Rocky Mountains, accented by a classic nautical compass rose and subtle flowing strokes representing the surrounding oceanic currents.

label: Banana
description: A single ripe banana rendered in a minimalist continuous line, positioned at a graceful curve with one strip of its peel curling downwards to reveal the smooth fruit inside, featuring a tiny stem at the top and delicate line-work to suggest depth against a stark white background.

label: libertad
description: A majestic personification of liberty stands in a profile pose atop a rocky summit, wearing flowing Grecian robes and a Phrygian cap with her hair streaming in the wind, triumphantly hoisting a flaming torch while clutching a set of shattered iron chains as the sun rises behind her.

label: justicia
description: A dignified female figure of Lady Justice stands in a stoic front-facing pose, wearing a classical flowing Roman stola and a simple fabric blindfold over her eyes, holding a pair of perfectly leveled scales in her outstretched left hand and a vertical double-edged sword in her right, all rendered in a minimalist continuous-line composition that emphasizes balance and impartiality.

label: derecho
description: A thick, leather-bound legal tome with a gold-embossed scale of justice on its spine sits slightly open on a polished mahogany desk next to a classic judge's gavel, depicted in a continuous, flowing minimalist line that emphasizes the weight and authority of the law.

label: rey
description: An authoritative monarch in profile seated upon a grand stone throne, adorned in a heavy ermine-trimmed mantle and an intricate filigree crown, grasping a ceremonial scepter and globus cruciger against a backdrop of minimalist Gothic arches in a continuous thinking line illustration.

label: corona
description: A continuous and fluid single-line illustration of a majestic golden imperial crown adorned with a central cross and intricate filigree, resting elegantly upon a plush, tasseled ceremonial velvet cushion within a minimalist and airy royal chamber setting.

label: caravel
description: A majestic 15th-century Spanish caravel in profile view, featuring three tall masts with billowing square sails adorned with the red Cross of Burgundy, a high-walled wooden stern castle, detailed rigging lines, and minimalist cresting ocean waves at its base, rendered in an elegant thinking line style.

label: mapa-de-espana
description: A minimalist continuous-line illustration showing the outline map of Spain, including the Balearic and Canary Islands, rendered with a clean and professional stroke on a white background.
